description: Bounded experiment policy defining risk limits, required validation, max changed files, and human-required categories for opportunity-signal-driven experiments. Referenced by the agent idea review gate and the planning loop when promoting signals to tasks.

code-change.description: Source code modification to validate a hypothesis about behavior or performance.

config-change.description: Configuration or environment adjustment to test operational hypotheses.

data-collection.description: Read-only data gathering to verify a signal observation. No code changes.

prototype.description: Throwaway proof-of-concept to test feasibility before committing to a full implementation.
prototype.notes: Prototype must not be merged without promotion to a full task. Mark PR as draft.

ab-test.description: Feature-flagged variation to measure impact against a control group.
ab-test.notes: A/B tests touching auth or data flows require architect review.

high.notes: High-risk experiments require both architect and security review before merge.

humanRequiredCategories.description: Experiment categories that always require human approval regardless of risk level.

auth-session.label: Auth / Session
auth-session.reason: Authentication and session changes affect all users and cannot be safely auto-reverted.

database-migration.label: Database / Migration
database-migration.reason: Schema changes may cause data loss and require dry-run validation.

public-api-contract.label: Public API Contract
public-api-contract.reason: API contract changes affect downstream consumers and require compatibility review.

production-config.label: Production Configuration
production-config.reason: Deployment and bootstrap config changes directly affect production behavior.

security-middleware.label: Security Middleware
security-middleware.reason: Middleware and interceptors affect the entire request pipeline.

validationPolicy.description: Required validation before an experiment result can be considered conclusive.

mandatoryChecks.description: TypeScript type checking must pass with zero errors.

conditionalChecks.description: Full test suite. Required when experiment touches src/ files.
Operations guard inventory check. Required when experiment touches docs/ or .github/ files.

scopeConstraints.description: Hard limits on experiment scope to ensure bounded risk.
scopeConstraints.notes: Broad glob patterns like 'src/**' are forbidden in experiment allowedFiles. Experiments must target specific modules or endpoints.

states.proposed: Signal accepted, experiment plan drafted. Awaiting review.
states.approved: Human reviewer approved the experiment plan. Ready to execute.
states.executing: Worker is running the experiment. Heartbeat active.
states.completed: Experiment finished. Results recorded in fact event ledger.
states.rejected: Experiment plan rejected. Rejection reason recorded.
states.rolled-back: Experiment was reverted due to failure or risk escalation.
